tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_validate_rejects_invalid_1')
config_payload = {'schema': 'unknown_schema', 'version': '1'}
expected_error_parts = ('schema', 'unknown_schema')

    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("config_payload", "expected_error_parts"),
        [
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1"},
                ("schema", "required"),
                id="schema-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "unknown_schema"},
                ("schema", "unknown_schema"),
                id="schema-unrecognized",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": 1},
                ("schema", "string"),
                id="schema-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": "linux"},
                ("os", "object"),
                id="os-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {}},
                ("os.name", "required"),
                id="os-name-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {"name": "windows"}},
                ("os.name", "macos", "linux"),
                id="os-name-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "package_manager": "pacman"},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "brew", "apt", "yum"),
                id="package-manager-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": "curl",
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages", "list"),
                id="packages-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "string"),
                id="packages-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="packages-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": "firefox",
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications", "list"),
                id="applications-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "string"),
                id="applications-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="applications-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "applications": ["firefox"]},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "required", "applications"),
                id="package-manager-required-with-apps",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": "copy"},
                ("actions", "list"),
                id="actions-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [1]},
                ("actions[0]", "object"),
                id="action-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "required"),
                id="action-type-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": 1, "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "string"),
                id="action-type-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "move", "source": "file.sh"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].type", "move"),
                id="action-type-unknown",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "actions": [{"type": "run"}]},
                ("actions[0].source", "required"),
                id="action-source-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "string"),
                id="action-source-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": ""}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "non-empty"),
                id="action-source-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": "/etc/passwd"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].source", "module-relative"),
                id="action-source-relative",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "link", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-link",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a"}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "required"),
                id="destination-required-copy",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [{"type": "copy", "source": "a", "destination": 1}],
                },
                ("actions[0].destination", "string"),
                id="destination-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "hidden": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].hidden", "boolean"),
                id="hidden-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "elevated": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].elevated", "boolean"),
                id="elevated-type",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "git" / "config.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/workspace', '/workspace/rig.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_validate_rejects_invalid_4')
config_payload = {'os': {}, 'schema': 'module', 'version': '1'}
expected_error_parts = ('os.name', 'required')

    @pytest.mark.error
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("config_payload", "expected_error_parts"),
        [
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1"},
                ("schema", "required"),
                id="schema-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "unknown_schema"},
                ("schema", "unknown_schema"),
                id="schema-unrecognized",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": 1},
                ("schema", "string"),
                id="schema-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": "linux"},
                ("os", "object"),
                id="os-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {}},
                ("os.name", "required"),
                id="os-name-required",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {"version": "1", "schema": "module", "os": {"name": "windows"}},
                ("os.name", "macos", "linux"),
                id="os-name-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {"name": "linux", "package_manager": "pacman"},
                },
                ("os.package_manager", "brew", "apt", "yum"),
                id="package-manager-invalid",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": "curl",
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages", "list"),
                id="packages-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [1],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "string"),
                id="packages-item-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "packages": [""],
                    },
                },
                ("os.packages[0]", "non-empty"),
                id="packages-item-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "os": {
                        "name": "linux",
                        "package_manager": "apt",
                        "applications": "firefox",
                    },
                },
                ("os.applications", "list"),
                id="applications-type",
            ),

            pytest.param(
                {

            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",

                ("actions[0].type", "move"),
                id="action-type-unknown",
            ),
            pytest.param(

            ),
            pytest.param(

                    "version": "1",

                ("actions[0].elevated", "boolean"),

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:

                ("actions[0].destination", "string"),
                id="destination-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "hidden": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].hidden", "boolean"),
                id="hidden-type",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "module",
                    "actions": [
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "a",
                            "destination": "~/a",
                            "elevated": "yes",
                        }
                    ],
                },
                ("actions[0].elevated", "boolean"),
                id="elevated-type",
            ),
        ],
    )
    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, object],
        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "git" / "config.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

                id="action-source-relative",

                    "actions": [{"type": "run", "source": ""}],

                id="action-source-empty",

                    },

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_fields(

        tmp_path: Path,

        expected_error_parts: tuple[str, ...],

                        "name": "linux",

tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_excluded_module_miss0')

    def test_plan_excluded_module_missing_source_does_not_fail(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Missing source files in excluded modules do not trigger file_not_found."""
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "bad_linux",
            configs={
                "config.yaml": module_schema(
                    os_name="linux",
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "missing.txt",
                            "destination": "~/missing.txt",
                        }
                    ],
                )
            },
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "good",
            configs={"config.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
        )
    
        filtered_by_os = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path, "--os", "macos")
        assert filtered_by_os.returncode == 0, filtered_by_os.stderr
        assert parse_stdout_json(filtered_by_os)["modules"] == [
            {"name": "good", "actions": []}
        ]
    
        filtered_by_module = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path, "--module", "good")
        assert filtered_by_module.returncode == 0, filtered_by_module.stderr
        assert parse_stdout_json(filtered_by_module)["modules"] == [
            {"name": "good", "actions": []}
        ]
    
        included = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path, "--module", "bad_linux")

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_excludes_disabled_preferences_and_defaults_enabled_true(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(
            tmp_path / "system" / "preferences.yaml",
            preferences_schema(
                [
                    {
                        "name": "Enabled by default",
                        "domain": "com.apple.finder",
                        "key": "ShowStatusBar",
                        "value": True,
                        "value_type": "bool",
                        "apply_command": (
                            "defaults write com.apple.finder ShowStatusBar -bool true"
                        ),
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "Disabled entry",
                        "domain": "com.apple.dock",
                        "key": "autohide",
                        "value": True,
                        "value_type": "bool",
                        "apply_command": (
                            "defaults write com.apple.dock autohide -bool true"
                        ),
                        "enabled": False,
                    },
                ]
            ),
        )

                    os_name="macos",
                    package_manager="brew",

                            "type": "link",
                            "source": "gitconfig",

                            "type": "run",
                            "source": "setup.sh",
                        },

                                "defaults write com.apple.dock autohide -bool true"
                            ),
                        },
                    ]
                ),
                "dock.yaml": dock_schema(["Firefox", "Safari", "Mail"]),

entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/workspace', '/workspace/rig.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_conflict_detection_r0')

    def test_plan_conflict_detection_runs_after_os_filtering(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        home_dir = tmp_path / "home"
        home_dir.mkdir()
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "mac",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    os_name="macos",
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "mac.txt",
                            "destination": "~/.shared",
                        }
                    ],
                )
            },
            files={"mac.txt": "mac"},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "linux",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    os_name="linux",
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "linux.txt",
                            "destination": "~/.shared",
                        }
                    ],
                )
            },
            files={"linux.txt": "linux"},
        )
    
        filtered = run_plan(
            entrypoint_argv,
            tmp_path,
            "--os",
            "macos",
            home_dir=home_dir,
        )
        unfiltered = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path, home_dir=home_dir)
    
        assert filtered.returncode == 0, filtered.stderr
        filtered_payload = parse_stdout_json(filtered)
        assert [module["name"] for module in filtered_payload["modules"]] == ["mac"]
>       assert unfiltered.returncode == 1
E       assert 0 == 1
E        +  where 0 = CompletedProcess(args=['uv', 'run', '--project', '/workspace', '/workspace/rig.py', 'plan', '/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_conflict_detection_r0'], returncode=0, stdout='{\n  "modules": [\n    {\n      "name": "linux",\n      "actions": [\n        {\n          "type": "copy",\n          "source": "/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_conflict_detection_r0/linux/linux.txt",\n          "destination": "~/.shared"\n        }\n      ]\n    },\n    {\n      "name": "mac",\n      "actions": [\n        {\n          "type": "copy",\n          "source": "/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_conflict_detection_r0/mac/mac.txt",\n          "destination": "~/.shared"\n        }\n      ]\n    }\n  ]\n}\n', stderr='').returncode

tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_preserves_preference0')

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_preserves_preference_value_types(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        write_yaml(
            tmp_path / "system" / "preferences.yaml",
            preferences_schema(
                [
                    {
                        "name": "bool-pref",
                        "domain": "com.apple.finder",
                        "key": "ShowStatusBar",
                        "value": True,
                        "value_type": "bool",
                        "apply_command": (
                            "defaults write com.apple.finder ShowStatusBar -bool true"
                        ),
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "int-pref",
                        "domain": "com.apple.dock",
                        "key": "tilesize",
                        "value": 42,
                        "value_type": "int",
                        "apply_command": (
                            "defaults write com.apple.dock tilesize -int 42"
                        ),
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "string-pref",
                        "domain": "com.apple.menuextra.battery",
                        "key": "ShowPercent",
                        "value": "YES",
                        "value_type": "string",
                        "apply_command": (
                            "defaults write com.apple.menuextra.battery "
                            "ShowPercent -string YES"
                        ),
                    },
                    {
                        "name": "float-pref",
                        "domain": "com.apple.dock",
                        "key": "float-value",
                        "value": 2.5,
                        "value_type": "float",
                        "apply_command": (
                            "defaults write com.apple.dock float-value -float 2.5"
                        ),
                    },
                ]
            ),
        )
    
        result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 0, result.stderr
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)
        actions = _actions_for_module(payload, "system")

.evaluation_tests/test_checkpoint_2.py:1288: AssertionError
________ test_plan_os_version_filters_only_preferences_in_mixed_module _________

entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/workspace', '/workspace/rig.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_os_version_filters_o0')

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_os_version_filters_only_preferences_in_mixed_module(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "system",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    os_name="macos",
                    package_manager="brew",
                    packages=["coreutils"],
                    applications=["firefox"],
                    actions=[{"type": "run", "source": "setup.sh"}],
                ),
                "preferences.yaml": preferences_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "name": "always-enabled",
                            "domain": "com.apple.dock",
                            "key": "always_enabled",
                            "value": True,
                            "value_type": "bool",
                            "apply_command": (
                                "defaults write com.apple.dock "
                                "always_enabled -bool true"
                            ),
                        },
                        {
                            "name": "ventura-only",
                            "domain": "com.apple.dock",
                            "key": "ventura_only",
                            "value": True,
                            "value_type": "bool",
                            "apply_command": (
                                "defaults write com.apple.dock "
                                "ventura_only -bool true"
                            ),
                            "min_version": "ventura",
                        },
                    ]
                ),
                "dock.yaml": dock_schema(["Safari"]),
            },
            files={"setup.sh": "echo setup"},

    def test_plan_topological_sort(
        entrypoint_argv,

    ) -> None:

        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",

            "c",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
        )

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

config_payload = {'environments': [{'language': 'python', 'manager': {'name': 'pyenv', 'plugins': ['bad']}, 'versions': ['3.11.2']}], 'schema': 'environments', 'version': '1'}
fragment = 'environments[0].manager.plugins[0]'

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("config_payload", "fragment"),
        [
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "environments",
                    "environments": "python",
                },
                "environments",
                id="environments-not-list",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "environments",
                    "environments": [],
                },
                "environments",
                id="environments-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                {
                    "version": "1",
                    "schema": "environments",
                    "environments": ["python"],
                },
                "environments[0]",
                id="environment-item-not-object",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [{"versions": ["3.11.2"], "manager": {"name": "pyenv"}}]
                ),
                "environments[0].language",
                id="missing-language",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": 1,
                            "versions": ["3.11.2"],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].language",
                id="language-not-string",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "",
                            "versions": ["3.11.2"],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].language",
                id="language-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [{"language": "python", "manager": {"name": "pyenv"}}]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions",
                id="missing-versions",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "python",
                            "versions": "3.11.2",
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},
                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions",
                id="versions-not-list",
            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(
                    [
                        {
                            "language": "python",
                            "versions": [],
                            "manager": {"name": "pyenv"},

                    ]
                ),

            ),
            pytest.param(
                environments_schema(

                        {
                            "language": "python",

                        }
                    ]
                ),
                "environments[0].versions[0]",
                id="version-empty",
            ),
            pytest.param(

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

    def test_validate_rejects_invalid_environments_shapes(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
        config_payload: dict[str, Any],
        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""
        write_yaml(tmp_path / "dev" / "environments.yaml", config_payload)
    
        result = run_validate(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)

        fragment: str,
    ) -> None:
        """Rejects invalid environments payload shapes and field-level path errors."""

entrypoint_argv = ['uv', 'run', '--project', '/workspace', '/workspace/rig.py']
tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_deduplicates_deps0')

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_deduplicates_deps(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Deduplicates repeated dependencies before ordering modules."""
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "core",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "app",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    actions=[],
                    depends_on=["core", "core", "core"],
                )
            },
        )
    
        result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 0, result.stderr
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)
>       assert [module["name"] for module in payload["modules"]] == [
            "core",
            "app",
        ]
E       AssertionError: assert ['app', 'core'] == ['core', 'app']
E         
E         At index 0 diff: 'app' != 'core'
E         
E         Full diff:
E           [
E         +     'app',
E               'core',
E         -     'app',
E           ]

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    @pytest.mark.parametrize(
        ("relative_path", "payload"),

                preferences_schema(

                            ),

                    depends_on=["core"],
                ),
                id="preferences-valid-depends-on",
            ),

                id="environments-valid-depends-on",
            ),
        ],

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_file_not_found_before_circular_dep(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Prioritizes file_not_found before checking circular dependencies."""
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "a",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(
                    actions=[
                        {
                            "type": "copy",
                            "source": "missing.txt",
                            "destination": "/tmp/missing.txt",
                        }
                    ],
                    depends_on=["b"],
                )
            },
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["c"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "c",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["a"])},
        )
    
        result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 1
        error = parse_stderr_json(result)

            tmp_path,
            "a",

        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["a"])},

            tmp_path,
            "c",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["a"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "d",
            configs={
                "module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["b", "c"])

tmp_path = PosixPath('/tmp/pytest-of-agent/pytest-0/test_plan_transitive_dependenc0')

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_transitive_dependency_chain(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Orders modules through a transitive dependency chain of depth 3."""
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "a",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "b",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["a"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "c",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["b"])},
        )
        write_module(
            tmp_path,
            "d",
            configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[], depends_on=["c"])},
        )
    
        result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path)
    
        assert result.returncode == 0, result.stderr
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)
>       assert [m["name"] for m in payload["modules"]] == ["a", "b", "c", "d"]
E       AssertionError: assert ['d', 'c', 'b', 'a'] == ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd']
E         
E         At index 0 diff: 'd' != 'a'
E         
E         Full diff:
E           [
E         +     'd',
E         +     'c',
E         +     'b',
E               'a',
E         -     'b',
E         -     'c',
E         -     'd',
E           ]

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_profile_module_filter_intersection(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Plan intersects requested --module names with the resolved profile set."""
        write_yaml(
            tmp_path / "manifest.yaml",
            manifest_schema({"all": {"modules": ["core", "shell", "dev"]}}),
        )
        for module_name in ["core", "shell", "dev"]:
            write_module(
                tmp_path,
                module_name,
                configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
            )
    
        result = run_plan(
            entrypoint_argv,
            tmp_path,
            "--profile",
            "all",
            "--module",
            "core",
            "--module",
            "dev",
        )
    
        assert result.returncode == 0, result.stderr
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)
>       assert _module_names(payload) == ["core", "dev"]

E

E         -     'core',

    @pytest.mark.functionality
    def test_plan_profile_dedup_inheritance_chain(
        entrypoint_argv,
        tmp_path: Path,
    ) -> None:
        """Plan deduplicates inherited modules across transitive profile hierarchy."""
        write_yaml(
            tmp_path / "manifest.yaml",
            manifest_schema(
                {
                    "base": {"modules": ["core", "dev-tools"]},
                    "work": {
                        "extends": "base",
                        "modules": ["dev-tools", "work-apps"],
                    },
                    "full": {"extends": "work", "modules": ["core", "media"]},
                }
            ),
        )
        for module_name in ["core", "dev-tools", "work-apps", "media"]:
            write_module(
                tmp_path,
                module_name,
                configs={"module.yaml": module_schema(actions=[])},
            )
    
        result = run_plan(entrypoint_argv, tmp_path, "--profile", "full")
    
        assert result.returncode == 0, result.stderr
        payload = parse_stdout_json(result)

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.
    
        This can be used to decode a JSON document from a string that may
        have extraneous data at the end.
    
        """
        try:
            obj, end = self.scan_once(s, idx)
        except StopIteration as err:

    def raw_decode(self, s, idx=0):
        """Decode a JSON document from ``s`` (a ``str`` beginning with
        a JSON document) and return a 2-tuple of the Python
        representation and the index in ``s`` where the document ended.

        have extraneous data at the end.
